Atty. Joel C. Spann of Severson & Werson, (415)677-5583, appearing for Defendant and moving party US Bank. No appearance by Plaintiff.

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: DEFENDANTS U.S. BANK NATIONAL AND MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS' DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Plaintiff lacks standing to bring this complaint and this complaint is barred by res judicata. Order for the same signed in open court. Order for the same signed in open court.
